---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for SpinnyBall
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you want to add.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. Why would this be useful?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in detail. Include:

- How it would work
- API changes if any
- User interface changes if any
- Performance considerations

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you considered and why you chose this approach.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the feature request here.

- Screenshots or mockups if applicable
- Related documentation
- Examples or references
